ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the competition */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host farm organizing the competition */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the competition */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the competition */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the host farm */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the host farm */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the host farm */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host farm */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the host farm */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the host farm */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews of the host farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the participant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the participant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition the participant is registered for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition type */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the competition type */,
  "prize_details" TEXT /* Details about the prizes for the competition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the competition location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the contact person to the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition linked to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender (user) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver (user) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the communication */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
